title: Add network opts to pods
body: Still needs tests, but this adds a large group of network options to `podman pod create`

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

List of things this resolves: 
#4718 
#4770 

Probably more
Also fixes #3837
One questions, otherwise LGTM
LGTM
docs test is barfing.
Argh. Needs manpages and bash completions. Will tackle tomorrow.
I appear to have broken Varlink, as well. Will fix.
Also fixes #2808
Added manpages. Next bash completions, fix varlink, add tests
Now also fixes https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/4432
I think I got the Varlink bug. Now moving on to testing.
Starting to add tests
Tests mostly done. Missing: `--ip`, `--mac-address`, `--network`.
There are some thorns with `--net=host` the way we're doing it right now. I think that we're close enough, though. Pushing the last few tests now, I think we're good to merge once things are green.
@rhatdan @vrothberg @giuseppe @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

LGTM
I like all of the tests.
/retest
Test failure: `/etc/hosts` appears to have unpredictable amounts of whitespace between IP and host for hosts we add, which is messing with my comparison. Will investigate further tomorrow.
Tests should start going green now, last issue is fixed
Everything is green - PTAL and merge
/lgtm
